title: Basic JavaScript Memory Management
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Memory Management. Focus on implementing Heap and stack correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Memory Management
description: Create a function that uses Heap and stack and Mark-and-sweep GC together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Memory Management Project
description: Build a small application that applies Heap and stack, Mark-and-sweep GC, Reference counting in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Memory Management
description: The following code has bugs related to Heap and stack. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Memory Management
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Heap and stack and Mark-and-sweep GC.
